title: How to install TrafficMonitor
description: Run PowerShell as Administrator and paste the install command.

title: How to remove TrafficMonitor
description: Run PowerShell as Administrator and paste the remover command. Type Y when confirmation appears.

title: How to run PowerShell as Administrator
description: Search PowerShell in Start Menu, right-click it, and choose Run as administrator.

title: SmartScreen warning explanation
description: Unsigned or new EXE files may show a Windows SmartScreen warning. Download only from official CyberSabil GitHub releases.
